AboutPage.introP1: Avantika develops, manufactures and promotes pharmaceutical products with a strong focus on quality, accessibility and long-term trust.
AboutPage.introP2: Our work connects production discipline, laboratory control and market partnerships into one reliable healthcare ecosystem.
AboutPage.introP3: We support healthcare professionals, distributors and patients with clear product information and consistent operational standards.
AboutPage.manufacturingDescription: Modern production infrastructure, trained specialists and documented workflows help maintain consistent quality from raw material to finished product.
AboutPage.qualityDescription: Our quality culture brings together analytical testing, regulatory discipline and a practical commitment to safer everyday healthcare.

process.title: A controlled path behind every medicine
process.description: From material intake to packaging, each product moves through precision, documentation and quality control.

materials.title: Material control
materials.description: Incoming materials are checked against documentation, identity and quality requirements.

formulation.title: Formulation
formulation.description: Process parameters are managed precisely to support a consistent dosage form.

production.title: Manufacturing
production.description: Dedicated lines and trained specialists keep the production workflow consistent.

quality.title: Quality control
quality.description: In-process and final controls confirm product safety and stability.

packaging.title: Packaging
packaging.description: Packaging follows labelling, protection and traceability requirements.

quality.title: Quality first
quality.description: Every process is built around traceability, compliance and patient safety.

science.title: Science-led
science.description: Research, laboratory control and evidence shape our product decisions.

global.title: Global mindset
global.description: We build responsible partnerships across regional and international markets.

ContactPage.title: Let’s connect with the right team
ContactPage.description: For partnerships, product information or pharmacovigilance questions, contact Avantika through the channels below.
ContactPage.address: 100047, Tashkent, Yashnabad district, Mashinasozlar MCA, Lyadova street 1st dead-end, house 9
ContactPage.officeDescription: Our team will route your request to the appropriate department and respond as soon as possible.

PharmacovigilancePage.title: Pharmacovigilance Service
PharmacovigilancePage.description: Continuous monitoring of adverse drug reactions, prevention of side effects, and ensuring patient safety when using our medicines is our top priority. If you experience an adverse reaction to any of our products, please fill out the form below.
PharmacovigilancePage.addressValue: 100047, Tashkent, Yashnabad district, Lyadova street, 1-dead-end, house 9.
PharmacovigilancePage.formDesc: Please provide information about the suspected adverse reaction. This information is critical for evaluating medicine safety.
PharmacovigilancePage.success: Your report was successfully submitted to the pharmacovigilance department. Thank you!
